user.title: Tracefy Bike Tracker
user.description: Enter your Tracefy account email and an app refresh token. Auth0 does not allow this app client to exchange only email/password.

reauth_confirm.title: Tracefy Bike Tracker Reauthentication
reauth_confirm.description: This entry was created before app API support or the saved token is no longer valid. Enter a Tracefy app refresh token.

error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to Tracefy. Check the refresh token, then try again.
